title: Carry out wet run tests on vessel outboard engines
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out wet run tests on vessel outboard engines demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to wet run an outboard engine

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Test procedures and information are accessed and interpreted and appropriate test method is selected1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and test equipment are selected and checked and wet run test area is prepared according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Test procedures and information are accessed and interpreted and appropriate test method is selected1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Tools and test equipment are selected and checked and wet run test area is prepared according to workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to wet run an outboard engine

elements.title: Set up engine and equipment for wet run test

pcs.text: Engine is checked for ability to run through testing operating range according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Engine is prepared and wet run equipment mounted according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Required testing equipment is attached to engine according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engine is checked for ability to run through testing operating range according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.2 Engine is prepared and wet run equipment mounted according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Required testing equipment is attached to engine according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set up engine and equipment for wet run test

elements.title: Carry out wet run test

pcs.text: Engine is started and operated throughout test operating range according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.2 Engine test results are monitored during wet run test according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.3 Wet run test results are recorded according to workplace procedures

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out wet run test

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and engine is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected4.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
